Drink Menu

Soft launch menu.

The soft launch menu lives here in the Drink Menu tab. Browse the drinks, then contact us for event pricing, availability, and custom options.

Mint To Be Mojito Fresh. Flirty. Meant for you. White rum, fresh mint, lime juice, sugar, splash of soda.
Pineapple Tease Mojito Sweet upfront… but she bites back. White rum, mint, pineapple juice, lime, sugar, soda finish.
Temporary Forever Margarita Feels like forever… but don’t get attached. Tequila, triple sec, lime juice, house margarita mix.
Drip It Up Margarita Pretty. Extra. And not for the weak. Tequila, citrus blend, edible glitter.
Henny Coolada Where classy meets a little reckless. Hennessy, coconut cream, pineapple juice, blended smooth.
Sneaky Link Nutcracker No strings. Just strong. Vodka, pineapple juice, citrus splash, hint of berry, signature mix.
Upgrades Make It Toxic • Drip It Up • Boss Cup Upgrade Add an extra shot, extra flavor, or upgrade to the signature E&J cup.
